keyPointsSummary: 'About to' shows an action that is going to happen immediately or very soon
Formula: am/is/are + about to + base verb
More immediate than 'going to' — usually within seconds/minutes

quickQuiz.answer: The train is about to leave.
I am about to go to sleep.

quickQuiz.hindi: बारिश अभी शुरू होने वाली है।
मीटिंग अभी शुरू होने वाली है।
quickQuiz.answer: The meeting is about to start.

quickQuiz.hindi: मैं अभी घर से निकलने वाला हूँ।
quickQuiz.answer: I am about to leave home.

quickQuiz.hindi: हम अभी खाना खाने वाले हैं।
quickQuiz.answer: We are about to eat food.
The sun is about to set.

quickQuiz.hindi: मैं अभी यह decision लेने वाला हूँ।
quickQuiz.answer: I am about to make this decision.

mustRememberRules: 'About to' shows an action that is going to happen immediately or very soon
Formula: am/is/are + about to + base verb
More immediate than 'going to' — usually within seconds/minutes
